instructions: Resolve every required input before side effects.
Stop when a required capability is denied, unsupported, or awaiting approval.
Stay within the project or an explicitly approved artifact root.
Preserve the named output contract and report skipped validation honestly.
Do not publish externally, mutate user scope, or rewrite Git history.

behaviorContract.purpose: Execute an explicitly approved plan step by step with traceability and minimal deviation.

decisionTable.when: PLAN_APPROVED is exactly true and the plan is readable.
decisionTable.action: Execute the approved plan in order.

decisionTable.when: PLAN_APPROVED is missing or not exactly true.

invariants: Treat the approved plan as execution scope.
Do not publish or rewrite Git history.
stopConditions: Permission, dependency, or overlapping-change blockers prevent safe execution.

workflowSteps.action: Validate both required inputs and exact approval.
Read the plan as source of truth.
Implement plan steps in order within scope.
Run every plan-required verification and proportionate regression checks.
Map completed changes and deviations back to plan steps.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop on any non-trivial deviation and request a plan update or explicit approval.

fields.name: implemented changes
fields.description: Workspace edits aligned to the plan.

validation: Confirm every change maps to a plan step.
Run plan-specified checks and report exact results.
Inspect the final diff for scope drift.

claimBoundary: Behavior-complete machine-readable contract generated from the canonical behavior IR; the Skill contains the same generated contract plus explanatory authored guidance.
